evals.prompt: I want to use the command line to quickly scrape a few pages and search the web. What CLI tools are available and how do I install them? Show me some common commands.
evals.expected_output: Should reference both Firecrawl CLI (npm install -g firecrawl-cli) and Jina CLI (pip install jina-cli), with practical commands like 'firecrawl scrape URL', 'jina read URL', 'jina search QUERY'. Should show pipe composability.
